description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a distinctive Mickey Mouse-shaped window or cutout on its front and rear panels, adding a playful and recognizable element. The exterior is primarily white with smooth surfaces, accented by blue seating that lines the interior walls, suggesting a waiting or resting area. The interior is open and accessible from both ends, with two rows of blue cushioned benches facing each other along the sides. The floor appears to be a dark, durable material, likely designed for high foot traffic. Overhead, the roof is flat and slightly curved, with integrated lighting and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The overall design is modern and whimsical, suitable for urban parks, transit stops, or themed environments.
description: A compact, white kiosk with a Mickey Mouse-shaped window, blue interior benches, and a flat, slightly curved roof. The design is modern and playful, with open access and seating inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white panel with a prominent Mickey Mouse-shaped window and hints of blue seating inside.
description_view_1: Interior view revealing two rows of blue benches along the sides and an open passage through the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view with another Mickey Mouse-shaped window, mirroring the front, and a glimpse of the blue seating.
description_view_3: Opposite interior view, again showing the blue benches and open access, with the floor and roof structure visible.
attribute_signage_type: logo, Mickey Mouse-shaped cutout integrated into front and rear panels; no visible text
attribute_window_presence: 2 windows, front and rear, both Mickey Mouse-shaped
attribute_door_configuration: none; open-ended entryways at both front and rear
attribute_roof_design: flat, slightly curved roof with integrated lighting; smooth, white material
